posts.raw_content:
Political moderates are actually twice as likely to endorse political violence as conservative people are...

https://yougov.com/en-us/articles/52960-charlie-kirk-americans-political-violence-poll

Its almost like... The more conservative you are, the more of a generally moral person you are. Its not a matter of centrists being the most righteous while people who are farther to the left and the right become more violent... It is literally just a linear line of "the further away from the right you are, the more violent you are." And that includes centrists... Centrist people are also significantly more violent than conservative people are.

This is why whenever you do see Republicans acting sketchy or asshole-ish... Its usually the centrist, White trash types who aren't actually conservative. The types of people who become fans of Andrew Tate or Sneako. I call them right-leaning liberals.
